description: Now you can support you favourite team with you scent as well as your jersey! This deodorant from manchester united has a great fragrance which is sure to turn all the girl's heads! The deodorant comes in a cylindrical bottle.Quantity: 150 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
